post.subject: Back at School
post.body:
Im in the library. I went to bed reasonably early, got up at 8:30 and was in class at 9:15. 

I am going to work hard - and have completed the practical work for this week! 

Found out that I am in group 2! Which means I dont actually have to be in class until 1:15pm on a monday!! 

My timetable looks like this - better than I thought

Monday    -  1:15 - 4:05
Tuesday   -  5:15 - 9:05
Wednesday - 12:15 - 1:00
Thursday  -  9:15 - 12:05
          -  3:15 - 7:05
Friday    - 10:15 - 12:05

Only one early morning! 

Definately gonna stick it out for the rest of the year and see what happens...

==================================================================================

Funny story, sainsburys here dont want me back... Apparently due to my 'absence levels and performance,' which is bullshit. But i really dont care. I still have a job at home, so I guess this just means i will have to go home everyweekend, but it'll be better that way!


I need some breakfast...
